chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA No.314 of 2020 Commissioner Inland Revenue Zone-II Versus M/s Dewan Cement Ltd. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection No.26 2. For orders on CMA 1089/20 3. For hearing of main case Dated: 27.10.2021 None present. -.-.- This Special Sales Tax Reference Application is pending since May 2020 and no one is present on behalf of the applicant. There is no intimation either. It appears that applicant has lost interest in the instant reference application, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
